items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding user-owned internal calendar bindings.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that user-owned internal calendar bindings can be selected as share sources. However, the provided evidence does not include any checks or confirmations related to the existence or functionality of these calendar bindings. As a result, it is impossible to determine whether the requirement is satisfied, leading to a blocked status due to inconclusive evidence.
